pr_title: Security: Fix SQL injection in search_users

priority_issues.description: The code is vulnerable to SQL Injection due to improper parameterization of the query in the search_users function.
priority_issues.recommendation: Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL Injection attacks. Replace the query construction with placeholders and pass the user input as parameters.

priority_issues.description: Potential SQL injection vulnerability fixed, but inefficient query parameterization used
priority_issues.recommendation: Use parameterized queries with placeholders to prevent SQL injection and improve query performance

priority_issues.description: The search_users method is violating the Single Responsibility Principle by mixing search logic with SQL parameterization concerns.
priority_issues.recommendation: Extract SQL parameterization into a separate method/class to separate concerns.
